steps.title: Use the time-distance-speed formula
steps.content:
The time to travel a distance at constant speed is: $$\text{time} = \frac{\text{distance}}{\text{speed}}$$

Substituting the given values: $$\text{time} = \frac{108 \text{ cm}}{12 \text{ cm/s}} = 9 \text{ s}$$

That matches choice A — A is correct.
